response.global_analysis: The audio consists exclusively of spoken English dialogue and game sound effects; no vocal music is present. I have used the prominent on-screen text (questions, rules, and point systems) to ensure precise transcription of names and game terms. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, with segmentations respecting natural pauses and maintaining semantic continuity across fast-paced interactions.

subtitles.original: What is the name of Raora's mascot?
subtitles.english: What is the name of Raora's mascot?

subtitles.original: Isaac Newton... famous for the law of gravity!
subtitles.english: Isaac Newton... famous for the law of gravity!

subtitles.original: This feels way shorter than William Shakespeare!
subtitles.english: This feels way shorter than William Shakespeare!

subtitles.original: Skip! Only one point! Skip! Only one point!
subtitles.english: Skip! Only one point! Skip! Only one point!

subtitles.original: You got this! Big one! Big one!
subtitles.english: You got this! Big one! Big one!

subtitles.original: I don't care! Skip, I don't care!
subtitles.english: I don't care! Skip, I don't care!

subtitles.original: Skip, I don't care! Skip, I don't care!
subtitles.english: Skip, I don't care! Skip, I don't care!

subtitles.original:
Isaac Newton vs William Shakespeare,
and they gave the same amount of points?
subtitles.english:
Isaac Newton vs William Shakespeare,
and they gave the same amount of points?

subtitles.original: That's not... I think that's unfair!
subtitles.english: That's not... I think that's unfair!

subtitles.original:
Yeah, I think it's unfair to play a game
where we need to read!
subtitles.english:
Yeah, I think it's unfair to play a game
where we need to read!

subtitles.original:
Well anyways, you want to know the winner?
You want to know your score?
subtitles.english:
Well anyways, you want to know the winner?
You want to know your score?

subtitles.original:
Good job, Gigi! This is why you
are a member of Justice!
subtitles.english:
Good job, Gigi! This is why you
are a member of Justice!

subtitles.original:
Hmph... Looks like you maggots still
need some serious training...
subtitles.english:
Hmph... Looks like you maggots still
need some serious training...

subtitles.original:
Alright, time for the second trial, you knuckleheads.
I got some special training gear for you!
subtitles.english:
Alright, time for the second trial, you knuckleheads.
I got some special training gear for you!

subtitles.original: What's this? I was just chilling...
subtitles.english: What's this? I was just chilling...

subtitles.original:
What is that? Ah, yes,
we are going to have a duel!
subtitles.english:
What is that? Ah, yes,
we are going to have a duel!

subtitles.original:
Rule 2: After 5 dizzying spins with the blindfold on,
it's time for an epic sword battle!
subtitles.english:
Rule 2: After 5 dizzying spins with the blindfold on,
it's time for an epic sword battle!

subtitles.original: And we have to spin five times!
subtitles.english: And we have to spin five times!

subtitles.original: Spin to win! Oh, you're good at this, Sissi!
subtitles.english: Spin to win! Oh, you're good at this, Sissi!

subtitles.original:
And after you spin five times, you will face off
against each other in an epic sword battle!
subtitles.english:
And after you spin five times, you will face off
against each other in an epic sword battle!

subtitles.original: To the death? While being blindfolded?
subtitles.english: To the death? While being blindfolded?

subtitles.original:
Rule 3: The remaining teammate can guide
the blindfolded player using only their voice...
subtitles.english:
Rule 3: The remaining teammate can guide
the blindfolded player using only their voice...

subtitles.original:
...to help them locate the target.
It's like a co-op game!
subtitles.english:
...to help them locate the target.
It's like a co-op game!

subtitles.original:
First, before you pick a team,
the points for each target!
subtitles.english:
First, before you pick a team,
the points for each target!

subtitles.original:
Elizabeth! Gigi! Time for you dirtbags
to beat the snot out of each other!
subtitles.english:
Elizabeth! Gigi! Time for you dirtbags
to beat the snot out of each other!

subtitles.original:
Ah yes! Huzzah! Alright Gigi,
let's put on our blindfold!
subtitles.english:
Ah yes! Huzzah! Alright Gigi,
let's put on our blindfold!

subtitles.original: Do it! For Justice! Blindfolds, blindfolds!
subtitles.english: Do it! For Justice! Blindfolds, blindfolds!

subtitles.original: Believe in yourself, I'm behind you!
subtitles.english: Believe in yourself, I'm behind you!

subtitles.original:
I choose you, Gigi-mon!
When do we spin?
subtitles.english:
I choose you, Gigi-mon!
When do we spin?

subtitles.original:
You are the queen! You are the leader!
Grab... ready!
subtitles.english:
You are the queen! You are the leader!
Grab... ready!

subtitles.original:
Go, Gigi! Right in front of you!
A little bit more!
subtitles.english:
Go, Gigi! Right in front of you!
A little bit more!

subtitles.original: Well, you have to walk like six steps!
subtitles.english: Well, you have to walk like six steps!

subtitles.original: I have the power of anime on my side!
subtitles.english: I have the power of anime on my side!

subtitles.original: Not that way! Wait, wait, wait!
subtitles.english: Not that way! Wait, wait, wait!

subtitles.original: Left, left! Turn to the left! Turn to the left!
subtitles.english: Left, left! Turn to the left! Turn to the left!

subtitles.original: Attack, attack! There she is! There she is!
subtitles.english: Attack, attack! There she is! There she is!

subtitles.original: Yeah, you got her! Roll away, roll away!
subtitles.english: Yeah, you got her! Roll away, roll away!

subtitles.original: Go, go, Liz! Go! She's on the ground!
subtitles.english: Go, go, Liz! Go! She's on the ground!

subtitles.original:
She's on the ground! Get up!
On your left, on your left!
subtitles.english:
She's on the ground! Get up!
On your left, on your left!
